title: Xtra Crunchy Middle Eastern Serrano Ham Umm Ali
description: A weeknight Middle Eastern dish featuring serrano ham, dashi extract, and crunchy elements, all in a jammy umm ali form, friendly to no onion no garlic diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Arrange the serrano ham slices on one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
In a small bowl, mix together the dashi extract, honey, and rose water, then brush the mixture evenly over the ham.
Sprinkle the chopped nuts and dried cranberries over the ham.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Brush the top of the pastry with the unsalted butter.
Bake the umm ali for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
